title: Repurposing large-format microarrays for scalable spatial transcriptomics.
author: Cipurko D Ueda T Mei L Chevrier N
content: S-EPMC11984966 PMC11984966 Repurposing large-format microarrays for scalable spatial transcriptomics. Spatiomolecular analyses are key to study tissue functions and malfunctions. However, we lack profiling tools for spatial transcriptomics that are easy to adopt, low cost and scalable in terms
